2372480.name: Project Otherside
2372480.description:
Project Otherside is a horror game in which you have to fight to escape from different levels of backrooms.
This game is based on the famous creepypasta. You have to explore the levels and you can find different objects along the way, but the deeper you go into the backrooms, the more dangerous it becomes, always stay alert and avoid the entities.
The main goal of Project Otherside is to captivate players with its gameplay, difficulty and atmosphere.
2372480.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语
